title: metaporana parvifolia var. pilosa
intro: Metaporana parvifolia var. pilosa, also known as the hairy small-leaved Metaporana, is a plant species that belongs to the family Metaponiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Metaporana parvifolia var. pilosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
